# Agam Arora

> Agam Arora is an AI Product Manager at AIonOS. He has 12 years of experience shipping products across analytics, gaming, beauty tech, logistics, and AI — including a Voice AI platform handling 4M+ calls/year and a $1M ARR data product at FarEye.

This site is hand-built in vanilla HTML. Every page is a self-contained file — no framework, no build step. The `/enter` page hosts an AI terminal grounded in the resume below, so questions about Agam's work can be answered conversationally.

For factual questions about Agam's career, `resume.md` is the ground truth.

## Pages

- [Home](https://agamarora.com/): landing page — greeting cycle, bio, three entry points (AI chat, projects, resume)
- [Resume](https://agamarora.com/resume): full career history, roles, and education
- [resume.md](https://agamarora.com/resume.md): plain-markdown source of the resume — ground truth for factual work-history questions
- [Lab](https://agamarora.com/lab/): open source projects and experiments
- [AI Resume template](https://agamarora.com/lab/ai-resume/): an open source template that turns a resume into a chat — PRFAQ and setup wizard
- [Talk to Agam's AI](https://agamarora.com/enter): immersive AI terminal, keyboard-background UI, streaming responses, grounded in the resume

## Canonical facts

- Full name: Agam Arora
- Current role: Assistant Vice President — AI Products, AIonOS India Pvt. Ltd. (since November 2025)
- Previous roles: Sr Principal Product Manager, UKG (Sep–Nov 2025); Lead Data Product Manager, AIonOS (Jun 2024 – Aug 2025); Lead Product Manager, FarEye Technologies (Dec 2020 – May 2024)
- Years of experience: 12+
- Industries shipped in: analytics, gaming, beauty tech, logistics, AI
- Education: PGDM in Marketing, FORE School of Management (2014); B.Tech in Computer Science, BM Institute of Engineering & Technology (2012)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/agamarora/
- GitHub: https://github.com/agamarora
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@agam_arora
- Personal site: https://agamarora.com

## Projects

- [Shararat Voice AI](https://shararat.agamarora.com): playful voice AI with two debating agents (Angel and Dan). Built for the Vapi Build Challenge. Code: https://github.com/agamarora/shararat-ai
- [AI Resume template](https://github.com/agamarora/ai-resume): open source template — paste one prompt, get a chat-based resume deployed in 30 minutes. Live demo: https://ai-resume-demo.netlify.app
- [Claude Code Resource Monitor](https://github.com/agamarora/utils/tree/main/luna-monitor): terminal dashboard for Claude Code usage, CPU, temps, GPU, disks, and processes

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://agamarora.com/llms-full.txt): the full resume and site content in one file, for single-paste context ingestion
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/agamarora): all open source projects
